name: InstalledUpdates
summary: The InstalledUpdates collector gathers data about installed updates, hotfixes, and security updates on Windows devices.

fields.name: description
fields.description: The description for the update package.

fields.name: hotfix_id
fields.description: Microsoft knowledge base identifier for the update package.

fields.name: install_date
fields.description: The date when the package was installed.

fields.name: installed_by
fields.description: The user name that performed the installation, qualified by its namespace.

examples.title: Example: Show which hotfix packages were installed by bad_user.
examples.v2_query: InstalledUpdates where InstalledUpdates description equals "Hotfix" and InstalledUpdates installed_by contains "bad_user"

examples.title: Which patches are security updates
examples.v2_query:
InstalledUpdates hotfix_id, install_date, installed_by, description
    WHERE InstalledUpdates description equals "Security Update"

examples.title: Which patches are hotfix updates
examples.v2_query:
InstalledUpdates hotfix_id, install_date, installed_by, description
    WHERE InstalledUpdates description equals "HotFix"

examples.title: Which patches were not installed by NT authority
examples.v2_query:
InstalledUpdates hotfix_id, install_date, installed_by, description
    WHERE InstalledUpdates description equals "HotFix"

examples.title: Specify - patch by KB number
examples.v2_query:
InstalledUpdates hotfix_id, install_date, installed_by, description
    WHERE InstalledUpdates hotfix_id equals "KB3097992"

examples.title: Specify - patch by date installed
examples.v2_query:
InstalledUpdates hotfix_id, install_date, installed_by, description
    WHERE InstalledUpdates installed_date after "2018-03-01"

examples.title: Specify - track a patch after a response date
examples.v2_query:
InstalledUpdates hotfix_id, install_date, installed_by, description     
    WHERE InstalledUpdates install_date after "2018-03-01"
        AND InstalledUpdates hotfix_id ends with "KB4012212"
            OR InstalledUpdates hotfix_id ends with "KB4012215"
            OR InstalledUpdates hotfix_id ends with "KB4012218"
            OR InstalledUpdates hotfix_id ends with "KB4015549"
